name: bionemo-agent-toolkit
description: NVIDIA BioNeMo agent skills for life sciences — protein folding, molecular docking, generative chemistry, genomics, protein design, and biomarker discovery as ready-to-call tools.

interface.shortDescription: Turn any agent into a life-science expert with NVIDIA BioNeMo skills.
interface.longDescription: A decade of NVIDIA life-sciences libraries, NIMs, and open models as portable agent skills: structure prediction, docking, generative chemistry, genomics, and de novo protein design. The plugin helps an agent pick the right tool, prepare inputs, run it, and interpret outputs.
defaultPrompt: Predict the structure of insulin with Boltz2
Design a de novo binder for a target with RFdiffusion and ProteinMPNN
Score a BRCA1 variant with Evo2
